interface.shortDescription: Codex port of revfactory/harness — the team-architecture factory.

plugins.name: codex-harness
plugins.description: The team-architecture factory for Codex CLI. Designs multi-agent teams and generates skills — six patterns: Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, Hierarchical Delegation. Provides skills/, MCP team-emulation server.
